diagnosis.differential_diagnosis: 18q deletion syndrome, paroxysmal dystonic choreoathetosis linked to chromosome 2q
diagnosis.diagnostic_reasoning: Diagnosis was based on karyotype confirming 18p deletion, exclusion of metabolic and mitochondrial disorders (e.g., MELAS, dopa-responsive dystonia) through laboratory testing, and neuroimaging findings (white-matter lesions, PET hypometabolism). The 18p deletion was deemed significant in the pathogenesis of dystonia after ruling out other causes.
